title: Positive flow: Complete all fields and register successfully
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the User Registration screen
test_data: John | Doe | 1234567890 | 1234567890 | john.doe@example.com | password123 | password123 | What is your mother's maiden name?
test_steps: Click on the 'First Name' field and enter 'John' | Click on the 'Last Name' field and enter 'Doe' | Click on the 'Phone' field and enter '1234567890' | Click on the 'Registration Code' field and enter '1234567890' | Click on the 'Email' field and enter 'john.doe@example.com' | Click on the 'Password' field and enter 'password123' | Click on the 'Confirm Password' field and enter 'password123' | Click on the 'Security Question' field and enter 'What is your mother's maiden name?' | Click on the 'Register' button
expected_result: The user is registered successfully and redirected to the home screen

title: Negative flow: Missing 'First Name' field
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the User Registration screen
test_data: | Doe | 1234567890 | 1234567890 | john.doe@example.com | password123 | password123 | What is your mother's maiden name?
test_steps: Click on the 'First Name' field and leave it empty | Click on the 'Last Name' field and enter 'Doe' | Click on the 'Phone' field and enter '1234567890' | Click on the 'Registration Code' field and enter '1234567890' | Click on the 'Email' field and enter 'john.doe@example.com' | Click on the 'Password' field and enter 'password123' | Click on the 'Confirm Password' field and enter 'password123' | Click on the 'Security Question' field and enter 'What is your mother's maiden name?' | Click on the 'Register' button
expected_result: The app displays an error message indicating that the 'First Name' field is required
